summary: Quadque Tech Limited is looking for an experienced, well-connected and organized Project Manager-IT to join our Panthapath office and take the company to the next level! Education Hub supports future leaders from Bangladesh in their quest to study at the best global institutes. Our team guide students at every step of the way.
responsibility: Installs and configures computer hardware, software solutions, operating systems, and applications.
Ability to think out the box and when under pressure.
Deliver a CRM training session to our new team mates or associates in a constructive manner.
Researching, Planning and executing SEO task in collaboration with Marketing Team.
Maintain our hosting and domains and update them where necessary.
Improve existing apps, website, CRM and database system.
edu_requirement: Bachelor or Masters in Computer Science Engineering from any reputed university
salary: 40000 BDT to 60000 BDT [Based on Updated Technological Knowledge Apply Method]
additional: Additional Reward - Based on Company Policy
